name: animaworks
description: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Ollama).
summaryZh: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Ollama). 这是一类偏执行和编排的 AI 项目，适合拿来搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
